redistribution.basis: The design is wholly synthetic and was authored specifically for this open-source repository; it contains no third-party project data.

artifacts.intended_semantic_difference: Baseline synthetic four-layer board for parser and routing operation tests. NOT validated by DipTrace open/save.
Frozen source revision from which input.dsn must be exported. NOT DipTrace-validated.

known_limitations: This is a synthetic MCP-generated fixture, NOT a DipTrace-exported fixture.
It has never been opened, saved, or re-exported by DipTrace.
It must NOT be used as evidence of DipTrace 5.3 compatibility.
No promotion path exists for this fixture.
The fixture validates MCP parser, routing compiler, and semantic operations only.
A real acceptance fixture must start from a genuine DipTrace-exported seed.
